pr.title: feat(replit): add agent instructions integration
pr.body:
## Summary
- add a beta `replit` instruction integration that manages a marker-delimited `replit.md` block for Replit Agent terminal-output guidance
- resolve the default target from `REPLIT_PROJECT_DIR` or the nearest git/project root, and wire install, uninstall, doctor, aggregate doctor, exports, docs, changelog, and CLI host lists
- harden malformed-marker handling so direct and aggregate doctor report broken Replit blocks consistently before install/uninstall refuse unsafe rewrites

## Validation
- `pnpm exec vitest run test/hosts/replit.test.ts test/cli/doctor-output.test.ts` (2 files, 12 tests)
- `pnpm lint`
- `pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false`
- `pnpm build`
- `pnpm verify` (68 files, 1054 tests)
- `git diff --check origin/feat/warp-integration...HEAD`
- privacy scan over changed text files
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/feat/warp-integration --prompt "Review the Replit agent instructions integration stacked on Warp after rebasing onto the updated Warp branch and fixing malformed nested Replit marker doctor detection. Focus on Replit rules path/projectDir behavior, install/doctor/uninstall marker handling including malformed markers, aggregate doctor option forwarding, docs/spec accuracy, tests, and regressions to existing rule/instruction hosts. Reject speculative broad rewrites; report concrete bugs only."` (clean)

## Review notes
- autoreview initially found nested/malformed Replit markers could be reported healthy by doctor while install/uninstall refused them; fixed by adding explicit malformed-marker doctor coverage and a nested-marker regression.
pr.author: vincentkoc
